title: In re Equifax Inc. Customer Data Security Breach Litigation — MDL, FTC/CFPB, and related actions
forum: U.S. District Courts (MDL) / FTC / CFPB / state attorneys general
technical_focus: Unpatched known vulnerability in web application stack
Large-scale exposure of credit file and consumer identifiers
Breach response at national credit bureau scale

timeline.event: Public disclosure of major consumer data breach
FTC and CFPB orders and related public enforcement materials
MDL proceedings and consumer settlement implementation (see docket and orders)

evidence_artifacts: Network segmentation and egress monitoring evidence
Breach notification and call center records
engineering_takeaways: Known critical patches missed at scale create regulatory and civil exposure across multiple agencies.
Credit bureau environments require aggressive patch governance and segmentation testing.
